description: Release-build verification gate required by Core §19.1.1 / SV-GOV-11. Enumerates the five mandatory CI checks every v1.0 release tag must pass before the MANIFEST is signed.

checks.description: extract-schemas.mjs re-run produces byte-identical schemas/ against committed copies (§19.1.1 #1).
checks.evidence: pnpm -w exec node scripts/verify-schema-parity.mjs exits 0; diff empty

checks.description: build-manifest.mjs re-run produces byte-identical MANIFEST.json + MANIFEST.json.jws against committed copies modulo the JWS signature bytes (§19.1.1 #2).
checks.evidence: pinned via soa-validate.lock.spec_manifest_sha256; local byte hash matches

checks.description: Orphan-detection script finds zero tests defined in `tests` but not referenced from `must_coverage` or `execution_order.phases` (§19.1.1 #3).
checks.evidence: spec-session verifies every M3 test ID appears under at least one must-map anchor

checks.description: SHA-256 recomputation of every file listed in supplementary_artifacts matches the committed digest (§19.1.1 #4).
checks.evidence: MANIFEST byte hash matches soa-validate.lock pin; no vectors changed since pin

checks.description: Every file under schemas/ parses as a JSON Schema 2020-12 document (§19.1.1 #5).
checks.evidence: ajv --spec=draft2020 validates each consumed schema at runner boot via @soa-harness/schemas registry

notes: This impl repo is one step behind the spec. Gate reflects the spec pin recorded in soa-validate.lock; bumping the pin requires re-running this gate.
